ground_truth.author_rationale: Two unsupported assertions -- the 'four occupants' seat count and the '14,000 feet' service ceiling, neither stated on the placard -- and one version error: the LS-1's night-VFR certification is attributed to the LS-2, which is day VFR only.

warning: AUTHOR-ONLY. Never assembled into rater-visible material. The runner's prompt-assembly guard forbids reading this directory.
